claim_title: Stale low_growth exports remain without matching projections

results.description: Check low_growth directory presence mismatch between exports and projections.
results.command: exports=0; projections=0; [ -d data/exports/low_growth ] && exports=1; [ -d data/projections/low_growth ] && projections=1; echo "LOW_GROWTH_EXPORTS_EXISTS=$exports"; echo "LOW_GROWTH_PROJECTIONS_EXISTS=$projections"; if [ "$exports" -eq 1 ] && [ "$projections" -eq 0 ]; then echo "ASSERTION=PASS"; else echo "ASSERTION=FAIL"; exit 1; fi
